title: Raw metagenomic data from sweep net samples collected in 2016 as part of the Slikok Creek Watershed Biotic Inventory
author: Bowser, Matthew L.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
We set out to inventory vascular plants, bryophytes, lichens, birds, arthropods, and earthworms on a grid of sites in the portion of Slikok Creek watershed that is on the Kenai National Wildlife Refuge, Kenai Peninsula, Alaska. Occurrence data, images, and field data sheets from this project are available via an  Arctos  project page at  http://arctos.database.museum/project/10002227 . 

 This dataset includes the raw FASTQ files from metagenomic processing and associated collection data. Of the 160 sweep net samples collected, 125 were selected for High Throughput Sequencing and shipped to RTL Genomics ( http://rtlgenomics.com ) for extraction and sequencing steps. Sequencing was performed on an Illumina MiSeq platform and reads were processed using RTL Genomics’ standard methods with the mlCOIlintF/HCO2198 primer set of Leray et al. (2013), yielding a 313 bp region of the COI gene. 

 Collection data are included in the file  ArctosData_43C6167EB1.csv  downloaded from Arctos. Extraction methods and sequencing methods provided by RTL Genomics are included in the files  Bowser 4869.pdf  and  Illumina MiSeq Two-Step Method 454 profile only.docx . Primers used are provided in the file  Bowser_4869M.txt . The archive  FASTQ.zip  contains all of the resulting FASTQ files. 

 These sequence data have also been been published to GenBank's Sequence Read Archive in accessions  SRR10454582 – SRR10454706  under BioProject  PRJNA427721 .

keywords: metabarcoding, bioinventory, biomonitoring, high throughput sequencing, arthropods, terrestrial invertebrates
